---
title: "Land & Environment"
title-block-banner: "#3F6F5E"
title-block-banner-color: "#F7F4EE"
body-classes: area-environment
---

![](../visual_assets/brand/botanical/solid/leaf-display-boreal.svg){.overview-leaf fig-alt="The Canada Observatory leaf in the Land & Environment colour"}

The physical country — its land, water, and ecosystems — and the atmosphere above it: climate change, air quality, and the emissions and energy behind them.

## The Land

::::{.columns}

:::{.column .area-card .area-environment width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-environment.svg){.area-banner}

### [Where People Live](index.qmd)
Population density by province and city, and Canada's place in the world.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-environment width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-environment.svg){.area-banner}

### [Ecozones & Land Cover](land.qmd)
Canada's 15 terrestrial ecozones and how land cover varies across them.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-environment width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-environment.svg){.area-banner}

### [Elevation](elevation.qmd)
A relief web-map of the landscape, with named peaks.
:::

::::

::::{.columns}

:::{.column .area-card .area-environment width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-environment.svg){.area-banner}

### [Water](water.qmd)
The 40 largest lakes and rivers.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-environment width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-environment.svg){.area-banner}

### [Agriculture](agriculture.qmd)
Agricultural land across the country.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-environment width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-environment.svg){.area-banner}

### [Protected Areas](protected.qmd)
Protected and conserved lands and waters.
:::

::::

## Climate & Atmosphere

::::{.columns}

:::{.column .area-card .area-environment width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-environment.svg){.area-banner}

### [Today's Climate](climate.qmd)
Climate normals across the country.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-environment width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-environment.svg){.area-banner}

### [Climate Change](../environment/climate-change.qmd)
National, regional, and city warming, by season, with warming spirals.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-environment width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-environment.svg){.area-banner}

### [Wildfire](wildfire.qmd)
Area burned since 1959 and the 2023 fire locations.
:::

::::

::::{.columns}

:::{.column .area-card .area-environment width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-environment.svg){.area-banner}

### [Ice](ice.qmd)
Permafrost zones and Arctic sea-ice extent.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-environment width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-environment.svg){.area-banner}

### [Air Quality](../environment/air-quality.qmd)
Emissions and concentrations over time, against peers, including wildfire smoke.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-environment width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-environment.svg){.area-banner}

### [Air Quality by City](../environment/air-quality-cities.qmd)
A monitoring dashboard for major cities, back to 1974.
:::

::::

::::{.columns}

:::{.column .area-card .area-environment width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-environment.svg){.area-banner}

### [Emissions & Energy](../environment/index.qmd)
Greenhouse-gas emissions, the electricity mix, and the path to a low-carbon grid.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column width="32%"}
:::

::::
